findings.evidence: `CubeFace.lean:79-81` proves the theorem exactly by `cubeVertices_subset (Finset.erase_subset v S) x`; existing API is `CubeWeight.lean:123` `theorem cubeVertices_subset {S T : Finset V} (hST : S ⊆ T) (x : V → ℤ)`.
findings.fix: Use `cubeVertices_subset (Finset.erase_subset v S) x` directly instead of adding a public parallel lemma.
findings.issue: `cubeVertices_erase_subset` is just the existing subcube inclusion specialized to `Finset.erase_subset`.

findings.evidence: `CubeFace.lean:104-108` proves the theorem exactly by `P.characteristicCubeWeight_mono k (Finset.erase_subset v S) x`; existing API is `CubeWeight.lean:233` `theorem characteristicCubeWeight_mono`.
findings.fix: Use `P.characteristicCubeWeight_mono k (Finset.erase_subset v S) x` directly, or avoid exposing this as new API.
findings.issue: `characteristicCubeWeight_erase_le` is a special case of the existing characteristic cube weight monotonicity lemma.

summary: The upper-face material appears new, but the lower-face API duplicates existing subcube monotonicity lemmas specialized to `S.erase v`. Remove the redundant lower-face wrappers or keep them private/local if only used as proof steps.
